info.title: SC Trade Tools API
info.description: Usage of this API without express written permission is prohibited

tags.name: Tool
tags.description: Endpoints for tools such as trade route finder, itinerary planner, and buyer finder

tags.name: Item
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about items such as gear, equipment and components

tags.name: Location
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about locations and location types

tags.name: Crowdsource
tags.description: Endpoints for crowdsourced retrieval and location bounties

tags.name: Commodity / Shop
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about commodity shop and their factions and security levels

tags.name: Commodity / Item
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about commodity items and types

tags.name: Internal
tags.description: Endpoints for internal use, not intended for public consumption

tags.name: Ship
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving information about ships

get.description:
Fetches crowdsourced commodity listings submitted to the website.
  • This data is unfiltered and may contain outliers
  • This endpoint is cached server-side for 1 hour

destination.example: Stanton > Crusader > Yela > Grim HEX > Admin
